StarConsent.title: Introducing Star Currency

items.quote: I use it most mornings to set an intention. It helps me start the day feeling more grounded.
items.author: Yui

items.quote: The reflections feel balanced—helpful without being pushy. It’s become a quiet ritual that helps me think more clearly.
items.author: Daniel

items.quote: I like how it gets straight to the point. The keywords make it easy to remember what to focus on.
items.author: Mina

items.quote: Surprisingly calming. Even when I don’t agree with everything, it still helps me pause and reflect before I act.
items.author: Chris

items.quote: The follow-up questions are my favorite. It feels like a real conversation that helps me untangle my thoughts.
items.author: Nok

hero.subtitle: See how we blend long-standing tarot traditions with AI to deliver personal cosmic guidance just for you.

ai.title: Clear AI-powered insight
ai.desc: Intentional interpretations tuned to your question

cosmic.title: Focused experience
cosmic.desc: A quiet space to read, reflect, and save what matters

personal.title: Designed for you
personal.desc: Built for everyday decisions and gentle reflection

story.title: Why we’re building this
story.p1: Asking Fate began with one idea: offer a calm, trustworthy place to pause and think clearly. No noise—just a short reading and a prompt to reflect.
story.p2: We keep it simple and practical, improving week by week with early users. If it helps you make one better decision, that’s success.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.p: Help people pause, reflect, and make everyday decisions with more intention—through tools that stay calm, clear, and genuinely useful.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.p: Become a trusted companion for intentional decisions: easy for anyone to use, and always respectful of privacy.

privacyFirst.title: Privacy first
privacyFirst.desc: Your questions and readings stay private. We never sell data.

clarity.title: Clarity over hype
clarity.desc: Short, plain-language interpretations you can act on right away.

inclusive.title: Inclusive by nature
inclusive.desc: Helpful for beginners and practitioners; welcoming across backgrounds and beliefs.

pressSection.title: Press, partners, or questions
pressSection.desc: We’re still early and welcome thoughtful collaborations. Reach out for a quick walkthrough or more details.

aiSection.title: How it works
aiSection.p1: You ask a question. We draw a card and craft a concise interpretation rooted in traditional meanings and tuned for clarity.
aiSection.p2: It’s guidance to consider, not a verdict. You remain in control of every decision.

respectfulTradition.title: Honoring tradition
respectfulTradition.description: We respect the sacred roots of tarot while making it accessible to modern seekers.

personalizedGuidance.title: Personalized guidance
personalizedGuidance.description: Every reading is different because it’s shaped by your question and life context.

inclusiveCommunity.title: Inclusive community
inclusiveCommunity.description: We welcome seekers from every background and belief, creating a safe space for exploration.

cta.title: Ready to begin?
cta.desc: We’ve just launched—join early users exploring calm, clear, practical guidance.

simple.title: Simple Reading

BirthChart.title: Decode your
BirthChart.subtitle: Cosmic Blueprint
BirthChart.description: Enter your birth date, time, and location. We will auto-detect your timezone and current location to help you generate a precise birth chart.
BirthChart.shareDescription: Share your cosmic blueprint with friends
BirthChart.disclaimer: Birth chart readings are for entertainment purposes only. The interpretations provided are generated by AI and should not be considered as professional advice. Always consult with qualified professionals for important life decisions.

houseDescriptions.1: This house represents your outer personality, physical appearance, and how you approach life.
houseDescriptions.2: This house governs your personal finances, material possessions, and sense of self-worth.
houseDescriptions.3: This house rules communication, intellect, early education, siblings, and short trips.
houseDescriptions.4: This house signifies your home, roots, family, mother, and emotional foundation.
houseDescriptions.5: This house covers self-expression, creativity, romance, children, and fun.
houseDescriptions.6: This house relates to daily work, health, service, and self-improvement.
houseDescriptions.7: This house focuses on serious partnerships, marriage, business contracts, and open enemies.
houseDescriptions.8: This house deals with transformation, death, rebirth, shared resources, and the occult.
houseDescriptions.9: This house governs higher learning, philosophy, religion, long-distance travel, and law.
houseDescriptions.10: This house represents your career, public image, reputation, father, and authority figures.
houseDescriptions.11: This house rules friendships, social groups, hopes, wishes, and humanitarian interests.
houseDescriptions.12: This house covers the subconscious, secrets, hidden enemies, institutions, and karma.

Sun.1: Your identity and self-expression are central to your personality. You shine through your individuality and have strong leadership qualities. Your ego and vitality are expressed directly through your outer persona.
Sun.2: Your identity is tied to your resources and values. You find confidence through material security and may express yourself through possessions. Your self-worth is connected to what you own and accumulate.
Sun.3: Your identity is expressed through communication and learning. You shine through your words, ideas, and intellectual pursuits. Your ego is tied to your ability to express yourself and share knowledge.
Sun.4: Your identity is rooted in home and family. You find confidence through emotional security and your roots. Your ego is connected to your private life and the foundation you've built.
Sun.5: Your identity is expressed through creativity and self-expression. You shine through your talents, romance, and ability to have fun. Your ego is tied to your creative output and personal expression.
Sun.6: Your identity is expressed through service and daily work. You find confidence through helping others and maintaining health. Your ego is connected to your ability to be useful and improve things.
Sun.7: Your identity is expressed through partnerships and relationships. You shine through your ability to relate to others. Your ego is tied to how you appear in partnerships and your ability to balance.
Sun.8: Your identity involves transformation and shared resources. You find confidence through deep change and regeneration. Your ego is connected to your ability to transform and handle intensity.
Sun.9: Your identity is expressed through philosophy and higher learning. You shine through your beliefs, wisdom, and search for truth. Your ego is tied to your worldview and spiritual understanding.
Sun.10: Your identity is expressed through career and public image. You find confidence through achievement and recognition. Your ego is connected to your reputation and professional success.
Sun.11: Your identity is expressed through friendships and hopes. You shine through your social connections and humanitarian ideals. Your ego is tied to your ability to connect with groups and realize dreams.
Sun.12: Your identity involves the subconscious and hidden matters. You find confidence through spiritual connection and letting go of ego. Your ego is connected to your inner world and spiritual growth.

Moon.1: Your emotions are visible and part of your outer personality. You're emotionally expressive and others see your feelings. Your emotional needs are tied to how you present yourself.
Moon.2: Your emotions are tied to security and resources. You feel secure through material stability and may have emotional attachments to possessions. Your feelings are connected to your values.
Moon.3: Your emotions are expressed through communication and learning. You process feelings through talking and intellectual activity. Your emotional needs involve mental stimulation and variety.
Moon.4: Your emotions are deeply connected to home and family. This is your natural house. You feel most secure at home and have strong emotional ties to family and roots.
Moon.5: Your emotions are expressed through creativity and romance. You feel secure through self-expression and fun. Your emotional needs involve being creative and enjoying life.
Moon.6: Your emotions are tied to daily work and service. You feel secure through routine and helping others. Your emotional needs involve being useful and maintaining health.
Moon.7: Your emotions are expressed through partnerships. You feel secure through relationships and may be emotionally dependent on partners. Your feelings are tied to how others see you.
Moon.8: Your emotions involve transformation and intensity. You feel secure through deep emotional bonds and may have intense emotional experiences. Your feelings are connected to shared resources.
Moon.9: Your emotions are expressed through philosophy and expansion. You feel secure through learning and exploring beliefs. Your emotional needs involve seeking truth and meaning.
Moon.10: Your emotions are tied to career and public image. You feel secure through achievement and may be emotionally invested in your reputation. Your feelings are connected to your professional life.
Moon.11: Your emotions are expressed through friendships and hopes. You feel secure through social connections and may have emotional attachments to groups. Your feelings are tied to your dreams.
Moon.12: Your emotions involve the subconscious and hidden matters. You feel secure through spiritual connection and may have deep, hidden emotional patterns. Your feelings are connected to your inner world.

Mercury.1: Your thinking and communication are central to your identity. You express yourself through words and ideas. Your mind is quick and you're known for your communication style.
Mercury.2: Your thinking is focused on resources and values. You communicate about money and possessions. Your mind is practical and you think about material security.
Mercury.3: Your thinking is naturally versatile and communicative. This is your natural house. You excel at learning, writing, and sharing ideas. Your mind is curious and adaptable.
Mercury.4: Your thinking is tied to home and family. You communicate about emotional matters and may think about your roots. Your mind is connected to your private life.
Mercury.5: Your thinking is creative and expressive. You communicate through art, play, and self-expression. Your mind is imaginative and you think about fun and romance.
Mercury.6: Your thinking is practical and service-oriented. You communicate about work and health. Your mind is analytical and you think about improvement and details.
Mercury.7: Your thinking is focused on partnerships. You communicate through relationships and may think about balance. Your mind is diplomatic and you consider others' perspectives.
Mercury.8: Your thinking involves transformation and depth. You communicate about intense topics and may think about mysteries. Your mind is penetrating and you seek hidden truths.
Mercury.9: Your thinking is philosophical and expansive. You communicate about beliefs and higher learning. Your mind seeks truth and you think about meaning and purpose.
Mercury.10: Your thinking is focused on career and reputation. You communicate about your profession and public image. Your mind is goal-oriented and you think about achievement.
Mercury.11: Your thinking involves friendships and hopes. You communicate about groups and ideals. Your mind is innovative and you think about the future and humanitarian causes.
Mercury.12: Your thinking involves the subconscious and hidden matters. You communicate intuitively and may think about spiritual matters. Your mind is creative and you process information unconsciously.

Venus.1: Your values and love nature are part of your outer personality. You're attractive and charming. Your approach to love and beauty is visible to others.
Venus.2: Your values are tied to resources and possessions. This is your natural house. You find beauty in material things and may earn through aesthetics. Your love nature is sensual and stable.
Venus.3: Your values are expressed through communication and learning. You find beauty in ideas and may love through words. Your love nature is playful and intellectual.
Venus.4: Your values are tied to home and family. You find beauty in your roots and may love through nurturing. Your love nature is emotional and protective.
Venus.5: Your values are expressed through creativity and romance. You find beauty in self-expression and love through fun. Your love nature is passionate and dramatic.
Venus.6: Your values are tied to service and daily work. You find beauty in helping others and may love through service. Your love nature is practical and helpful.
Venus.7: Your values are expressed through partnerships. This is also your natural house. You find beauty in relationships and love through partnership. Your love nature is balanced and harmonious.
Venus.8: Your values involve transformation and intensity. You find beauty in depth and may love intensely. Your love nature is passionate and transformative.
Venus.9: Your values are expressed through philosophy and expansion. You find beauty in beliefs and may love through learning. Your love nature is optimistic and adventurous.
Venus.10: Your values are tied to career and reputation. You find beauty in achievement and may love through your profession. Your love nature is ambitious and traditional.
Venus.11: Your values involve friendships and hopes. You find beauty in groups and may love through friendship. Your love nature is independent and humanitarian.
Venus.12: Your values involve the subconscious and spiritual matters. You find beauty in dreams and may love through compassion. Your love nature is idealistic and selfless.

Mars.1: Your energy and drive are central to your identity. You're assertive and action-oriented. Your approach to conflict and desire is direct and visible.
Mars.2: Your energy is focused on resources and values. You take action to build security and may be driven by material goals. Your assertiveness is tied to possessions.
Mars.3: Your energy is expressed through communication and learning. You take action through words and ideas. Your drive involves mental pursuits and variety.
Mars.4: Your energy is tied to home and family. You take action to protect your roots and may be driven by emotional security. Your assertiveness is connected to your private life.
Mars.5: Your energy is expressed through creativity and romance. You take action through self-expression and fun. Your drive involves passion and play.
Mars.6: Your energy is focused on service and daily work. You take action through helping others and maintaining health. Your drive involves improvement and routine.
Mars.7: Your energy is expressed through partnerships. You take action through relationships and may be driven by partnership goals. Your assertiveness is tied to how you relate.
Mars.8: Your energy involves transformation and intensity. This is also your natural house. You take action through deep change and may be driven by power. Your drive is intense and transformative.
Mars.9: Your energy is expressed through philosophy and expansion. You take action through beliefs and may be driven by truth-seeking. Your drive involves adventure and learning.
Mars.10: Your energy is focused on career and reputation. You take action through your profession and may be driven by achievement. Your assertiveness is tied to your public image.
Mars.11: Your energy involves friendships and hopes. You take action through groups and may be driven by ideals. Your drive involves innovation and humanitarian causes.
Mars.12: Your energy involves the subconscious and hidden matters. You take action through spiritual practice and may suppress direct action. Your drive is internal and may involve service.

Jupiter.1: Your growth and expansion are central to your identity. You're optimistic and philosophical. Your approach to life is expansive and you seek meaning through your personality.
Jupiter.2: Your growth is tied to resources and values. You expand through building security and may find luck through possessions. Your optimism is connected to material abundance.
Jupiter.3: Your growth is expressed through communication and learning. You expand through knowledge and may find luck through ideas. Your optimism involves mental pursuits.
Jupiter.4: Your growth is tied to home and family. You expand through emotional security and may find luck through your roots. Your optimism is connected to your foundation.
Jupiter.5: Your growth is expressed through creativity and romance. You expand through self-expression and may find luck through fun. Your optimism involves play and creativity.
Jupiter.6: Your growth is focused on service and daily work. You expand through helping others and may find luck through health. Your optimism involves improvement and routine.
Jupiter.7: Your growth is expressed through partnerships. You expand through relationships and may find luck through others. Your optimism is connected to balance and harmony.
Jupiter.8: Your growth involves transformation and shared resources. You expand through deep change and may find luck through transformation. Your optimism is connected to regeneration.
Jupiter.9: Your growth is expressed through philosophy and higher learning. This is your natural house. You expand through beliefs and find luck through seeking truth. Your optimism involves meaning and purpose.
Jupiter.10: Your growth is focused on career and reputation. You expand through achievement and may find luck through your profession. Your optimism is connected to your public image.
Jupiter.11: Your growth involves friendships and hopes. You expand through groups and may find luck through ideals. Your optimism involves humanitarian causes and innovation.
Jupiter.12: Your growth involves the subconscious and spiritual matters. This is also your natural house. You expand through spiritual connection and may find luck through compassion. Your optimism involves transcendence.

Saturn.1: Your challenges and discipline are central to your identity. You're serious and responsible. Your approach to life involves structure and you may feel restricted in self-expression.
Saturn.2: Your challenges are tied to resources and values. You build security through discipline and may face restrictions with money. Your responsibility involves material stability.
Saturn.3: Your challenges are expressed through communication and learning. You build knowledge through discipline and may face restrictions in expression. Your responsibility involves education.
Saturn.4: Your challenges are tied to home and family. You build security through discipline and may face restrictions with roots. Your responsibility involves emotional foundations.
Saturn.5: Your challenges are expressed through creativity and romance. You build self-expression through discipline and may face restrictions in play. Your responsibility involves creative work.
Saturn.6: Your challenges are focused on service and daily work. You build health through discipline and may face restrictions in routine. Your responsibility involves service and improvement.
Saturn.7: Your challenges are expressed through partnerships. You build relationships through discipline and may face restrictions in relating. Your responsibility involves commitment and balance.
Saturn.8: Your challenges involve transformation and shared resources. You build change through discipline and may face restrictions with intensity. Your responsibility involves regeneration.
Saturn.9: Your challenges are expressed through philosophy and higher learning. You build beliefs through discipline and may face restrictions in expansion. Your responsibility involves seeking truth.
Saturn.10: Your challenges are focused on career and reputation. This is your natural house. You build achievement through discipline and may face restrictions professionally. Your responsibility involves your public image.
Saturn.11: Your challenges involve friendships and hopes. You build groups through discipline and may face restrictions with ideals. Your responsibility involves innovation and humanitarian causes.
Saturn.12: Your challenges involve the subconscious and hidden matters. You build spirituality through discipline and may face restrictions with illusions. Your responsibility involves inner work and letting go.

Rahu.1: Your desires involve being independent and taking initiative. You're drawn to leadership and may obsess over being first. Your ambitions are tied to your identity.
Rahu.2: Your desires involve accumulating resources and material security. You're drawn to possessions and may obsess over money. Your ambitions are tied to values.
Rahu.3: Your desires involve communication and learning. You're drawn to knowledge and may obsess over ideas. Your ambitions are tied to mental pursuits.
Rahu.4: Your desires involve home and family security. You're drawn to roots and may obsess over emotional stability. Your ambitions are tied to your foundation.
Rahu.5: Your desires involve creativity and recognition. You're drawn to self-expression and may obsess over being admired. Your ambitions are tied to play and romance.
Rahu.6: Your desires involve service and perfection. You're drawn to helping others and may obsess over health. Your ambitions are tied to improvement.
Rahu.7: Your desires involve partnerships and balance. You're drawn to relationships and may obsess over finding the perfect partner. Your ambitions are tied to harmony.
Rahu.8: Your desires involve transformation and power. You're drawn to intensity and may obsess over control. Your ambitions are tied to deep change.
Rahu.9: Your desires involve philosophy and expansion. You're drawn to truth-seeking and may obsess over beliefs. Your ambitions are tied to higher learning.
Rahu.10: Your desires involve career and achievement. You're drawn to recognition and may obsess over status. Your ambitions are tied to your public image.
Rahu.11: Your desires involve friendships and innovation. You're drawn to groups and may obsess over ideals. Your ambitions are tied to humanitarian causes.
Rahu.12: Your desires involve spirituality and escape. You're drawn to transcendence and may obsess over illusions. Your ambitions are tied to letting go.

Ketu.1: You're releasing attachment to ego and identity. Your spiritual path involves learning humility and letting go of the need to be first. You seek detachment from self.
Ketu.2: You're releasing attachment to possessions and material security. Your spiritual path involves learning to value non-material things. You seek detachment from resources.
Ketu.3: You're releasing attachment to communication and mental activity. Your spiritual path involves learning silence and going beyond words. You seek detachment from ideas.
Ketu.4: You're releasing attachment to home and family patterns. Your spiritual path involves learning independence and letting go of the past. You seek detachment from roots.
Ketu.5: You're releasing attachment to creativity and recognition. Your spiritual path involves learning humility and letting go of the need for attention. You seek detachment from self-expression.
Ketu.6: You're releasing attachment to service and perfection. Your spiritual path involves learning to accept imperfection. You seek detachment from improvement.
Ketu.7: You're releasing attachment to partnerships and balance. Your spiritual path involves learning independence and letting go of the need for others. You seek detachment from relationships.
Ketu.8: You're releasing attachment to power and control. Your spiritual path involves learning to let go and finding peace in surrender. You seek detachment from transformation.
Ketu.9: You're releasing attachment to beliefs and expansion. Your spiritual path involves learning to be present and letting go of the need to seek more. You seek detachment from philosophy.
Ketu.10: You're releasing attachment to career and achievement. Your spiritual path involves learning flexibility and letting go of the need for status. You seek detachment from reputation.
Ketu.11: You're releasing attachment to friendships and innovation. Your spiritual path involves learning connection and letting go of the need to be different. You seek detachment from groups.
Ketu.12: You're releasing attachment to illusions and escape. Your spiritual path involves learning to face reality and letting go of the need to transcend. You seek detachment from the subconscious.

Ascendant.1: Your outer personality is your identity. This is your natural house. How others see you is central to who you are. Your approach to life defines your essence.
Ascendant.2: Your outer personality is tied to resources and values. Others see you as stable and value-oriented. Your approach to life involves building security.
Ascendant.3: Your outer personality is communicative and versatile. Others see you as curious and adaptable. Your approach to life involves learning and sharing ideas.
Ascendant.4: Your outer personality is nurturing and protective. Others see you as emotional and family-oriented. Your approach to life involves creating security.
Ascendant.5: Your outer personality is creative and expressive. Others see you as playful and dramatic. Your approach to life involves self-expression and fun.
Ascendant.6: Your outer personality is practical and service-oriented. Others see you as helpful and detail-focused. Your approach to life involves improvement and service.
Ascendant.7: Your outer personality is diplomatic and relationship-focused. Others see you as balanced and cooperative. Your approach to life involves partnership and harmony.
Ascendant.8: Your outer personality is intense and mysterious. Others see you as transformative and deep. Your approach to life involves intensity and regeneration.
Ascendant.9: Your outer personality is optimistic and philosophical. Others see you as adventurous and truth-seeking. Your approach to life involves expansion and learning.
Ascendant.10: Your outer personality is serious and ambitious. Others see you as responsible and goal-oriented. Your approach to life involves achievement and structure.
Ascendant.11: Your outer personality is unique and independent. Others see you as innovative and humanitarian. Your approach to life involves freedom and ideals.
Ascendant.12: Your outer personality is dreamy and intuitive. Others see you as artistic and compassionate. Your approach to life involves spirituality and inner work.

Sun.Aries: Your identity is bold, independent, and pioneering. You're a natural leader who takes initiative and isn't afraid to be first. Your confidence comes from action and courage.
Sun.Taurus: Your identity is stable, reliable, and grounded. You value security, beauty, and comfort. Your confidence comes from building something lasting and tangible.
Sun.Gemini: Your identity is curious, communicative, and versatile. You're adaptable and love learning. Your confidence comes from knowledge and the ability to express ideas.
Sun.Cancer: Your identity is nurturing, protective, and emotional. You value family and security. Your confidence comes from emotional connection and caring for others.
Sun.Leo: Your identity is confident, creative, and dramatic. You love being in the spotlight and expressing yourself. Your confidence comes from self-expression and recognition.
Sun.Virgo: Your identity is practical, analytical, and service-oriented. You find confidence through improvement and being helpful. You value precision and efficiency.
Sun.Libra: Your identity is diplomatic, aesthetic, and relationship-focused. Your confidence comes from harmony, beauty, and partnership. You seek balance in all things.
Sun.Scorpio: Your identity is intense, transformative, and powerful. Your confidence comes from depth and the ability to regenerate. You're drawn to mysteries and hidden truths.
Sun.Sagittarius: Your identity is optimistic, adventurous, and philosophical. Your confidence comes from seeking truth and expanding horizons. You value freedom and honesty.
Sun.Capricorn: Your identity is ambitious, disciplined, and traditional. Your confidence comes from achievement and building structures. You value responsibility and respect.
Sun.Aquarius: Your identity is unique, independent, and forward-thinking. Your confidence comes from innovation and humanitarian values. You march to your own beat.
Sun.Pisces: Your identity is dreamy, compassionate, and intuitive. Your confidence comes from creativity and spiritual connection. You're artistic and empathetic.

Moon.Aries: Your emotions are quick, fiery, and impulsive. You feel things intensely and react immediately. You need independence and action to feel secure.
Moon.Taurus: Your emotions are stable, steady, and sensual. You feel secure through comfort, beauty, and stability. You value routine and material security.
Moon.Gemini: Your emotions are changeable, curious, and mental. You process feelings through communication and variety. You need mental stimulation to feel secure.
Moon.Cancer: Your emotions are deep, nurturing, and protective. This is your natural sign, so feelings are central. You need emotional security and family connection.
Moon.Leo: Your emotions are warm, dramatic, and proud. You feel secure through recognition and self-expression. You need to feel special and admired.
Moon.Virgo: Your emotions are practical, analytical, and service-oriented. You process feelings through helping others and improving things. You need order to feel secure.
Moon.Libra: Your emotions are balanced, harmonious, and relationship-focused. You feel secure through partnership and beauty. You need harmony to feel emotionally stable.
Moon.Scorpio: Your emotions are intense, deep, and transformative. You feel things powerfully and may keep feelings hidden. You need depth and intensity to feel secure.
Moon.Sagittarius: Your emotions are optimistic, adventurous, and philosophical. You feel secure through freedom and expansion. You need adventure and meaning to feel fulfilled.
Moon.Capricorn: Your emotions are controlled, disciplined, and reserved. You may suppress feelings and need structure to feel secure. You value emotional responsibility.
Moon.Aquarius: Your emotions are detached, independent, and humanitarian. You feel secure through freedom and innovation. You may intellectualize feelings.
Moon.Pisces: Your emotions are dreamy, compassionate, and intuitive. You feel things deeply and may absorb others' emotions. You need spiritual connection to feel secure.

Mercury.Aries: Your thinking is quick, direct, and assertive. You communicate boldly and make decisions rapidly. You're straightforward and may be impatient with slow thinkers.
Mercury.Taurus: Your thinking is practical, steady, and grounded. You communicate slowly and deliberately. You think about material security and practical matters.
Mercury.Gemini: Your thinking is versatile, curious, and quick. This is your natural sign, so communication is central. You love learning and sharing ideas.
Mercury.Virgo: Your thinking is analytical, precise, and detail-oriented. This is also your natural sign. You excel at analysis and practical problem-solving.
Mercury.Cancer: Your thinking is emotional, intuitive, and memory-focused. You communicate with feeling and remember emotional details. You think about security and family.
Mercury.Leo: Your thinking is creative, dramatic, and confident. You communicate with flair and love sharing your ideas. You think about self-expression and recognition.
Mercury.Libra: Your thinking is balanced, diplomatic, and aesthetic. You communicate harmoniously and consider all perspectives. You think about relationships and beauty.
Mercury.Scorpio: Your thinking is intense, penetrating, and secretive. You communicate with depth and may keep some thoughts private. You think about transformation and mysteries.
Mercury.Sagittarius: Your thinking is philosophical, optimistic, and expansive. You communicate with enthusiasm and love sharing knowledge. You think about truth and meaning.
Mercury.Capricorn: Your thinking is serious, structured, and goal-oriented. You communicate purposefully and think about long-term plans and responsibilities.
Mercury.Aquarius: Your thinking is innovative, independent, and original. You communicate uniquely and think about the future and humanitarian ideals.
Mercury.Pisces: Your thinking is intuitive, creative, and dreamy. You communicate with imagination and may think in images or symbols. You're highly intuitive.

Venus.Aries: You're attracted to bold, independent people and passionate relationships. Love is exciting and direct. You value independence and action in relationships.
Venus.Taurus: You're attracted to stable, sensual people and loyal relationships. This is your natural sign. You value security, beauty, and physical comfort in love.
Venus.Gemini: You're attracted to communicative, intellectual people and playful relationships. You value mental connection and variety in love. You may have multiple interests.
Venus.Cancer: You're attracted to nurturing, emotional people and protective relationships. You value security and emotional connection. You're caring and devoted.
Venus.Leo: You're attracted to confident, creative people and dramatic relationships. You value admiration and self-expression. You love being adored and giving affection.
Venus.Virgo: You're attracted to practical, helpful people and service-oriented relationships. You show love through acts of service and value improvement in relationships.
Venus.Libra: You're attracted to balanced, aesthetic people and harmonious relationships. This is your natural sign. You value partnership, beauty, and harmony in love.
Venus.Scorpio: You're attracted to intense, transformative people and passionate relationships. You value depth and intensity. Love is transformative and all-consuming.
Venus.Sagittarius: You're attracted to adventurous, philosophical people and free-spirited relationships. You value honesty and growth. You need freedom in relationships.
Venus.Capricorn: You're attracted to serious, ambitious people and traditional relationships. You value commitment and long-term security. Love is practical and responsible.
Venus.Aquarius: You're attracted to unique, independent people and unconventional relationships. You value friendship and freedom. Love is innovative and non-traditional.
Venus.Pisces: You're attracted to dreamy, compassionate people and idealistic relationships. You value spiritual connection and empathy. Love is romantic and selfless.

Mars.Aries: Your energy is direct, impulsive, and competitive. This is your natural sign. You take action immediately and aren't afraid of conflict. You're a natural warrior.
Mars.Taurus: Your energy is steady, persistent, and sensual. You take action slowly but persistently. You channel energy into building security and material comfort.
Mars.Gemini: Your energy is quick, versatile, and communicative. You take action through words and ideas. You may have multiple projects and need mental stimulation.
Mars.Cancer: Your energy is emotional, protective, and defensive. You take action to protect loved ones. You may suppress anger and need emotional security to act.
Mars.Leo: Your energy is dramatic, confident, and creative. You take action with flair and love being recognized. You channel energy into self-expression and leadership.
Mars.Virgo: Your energy is practical, precise, and service-oriented. You take action through detailed work and improvement. You channel energy into helping and perfecting.
Mars.Libra: Your energy is balanced, diplomatic, and relationship-focused. You may avoid direct conflict and take action through partnership. You channel energy into harmony.
Mars.Scorpio: Your energy is intense, focused, and transformative. This is also your natural sign. You take action with determination and channel energy into deep transformation.
Mars.Sagittarius: Your energy is adventurous, optimistic, and expansive. You take action through adventure and exploration. You channel energy into seeking truth and meaning.
Mars.Capricorn: Your energy is disciplined, ambitious, and goal-oriented. You take action systematically and channel energy into building structures and achieving goals.
Mars.Aquarius: Your energy is innovative, independent, and rebellious. You take action through innovation and channel energy into breaking free from tradition.
Mars.Pisces: Your energy is intuitive, compassionate, and sometimes passive. You may avoid direct action and channel energy into creativity, service, or spiritual pursuits.

Jupiter.Aries: Your growth comes through leadership, initiative, and pioneering. You're optimistic about new beginnings and find luck through taking action and being first.
Jupiter.Taurus: Your growth comes through building security, accumulating resources, and appreciating beauty. You find luck through steady effort and material stability.
Jupiter.Gemini: Your growth comes through learning, communication, and variety. You find luck through knowledge, teaching, and connecting with others intellectually.
Jupiter.Cancer: Your growth comes through emotional security, family, and nurturing. This is your natural sign. You find luck through caring for others and building emotional foundations.
Jupiter.Leo: Your growth comes through creativity, self-expression, and recognition. You find luck through sharing your talents and being admired. You're generous and optimistic.
Jupiter.Virgo: Your growth comes through service, improvement, and practical wisdom. You find luck through helping others and perfecting your skills. You value health and efficiency.
Jupiter.Libra: Your growth comes through partnership, harmony, and aesthetics. You find luck through relationships and creating beauty. You value justice and balance.
Jupiter.Scorpio: Your growth comes through transformation, depth, and shared resources. You find luck through regeneration and uncovering hidden truths. You're drawn to mysteries.
Jupiter.Sagittarius: Your growth comes through expansion, philosophy, and adventure. This is your natural sign. You find luck through seeking truth, travel, and higher learning.
Jupiter.Capricorn: Your growth comes through discipline, structure, and achievement. You find luck through building lasting foundations and taking responsibility. You value tradition.
Jupiter.Aquarius: Your growth comes through innovation, independence, and humanitarian ideals. You find luck through breaking free from tradition and embracing uniqueness.
Jupiter.Pisces: Your growth comes through spirituality, compassion, and creativity. This is also your natural sign. You find luck through intuition, art, and spiritual connection.

Saturn.Aries: Your challenges involve learning patience, controlling impulsiveness, and taking responsibility for your actions. You build discipline through leadership and initiative.
Saturn.Taurus: Your challenges involve financial security, material stability, and learning to value what you have. You build discipline through steady effort and persistence.
Saturn.Gemini: Your challenges involve focus, communication, and learning to commit to ideas. You build discipline through education and clear thinking.
Saturn.Cancer: Your challenges involve emotional security, family responsibilities, and learning to protect yourself. You build discipline through nurturing and emotional maturity.
Saturn.Leo: Your challenges involve ego, creativity, and learning humility. You build discipline through self-expression and taking responsibility for your talents.
Saturn.Virgo: Your challenges involve perfectionism, service, and learning to accept imperfection. You build discipline through practical work and helping others.
Saturn.Libra: Your challenges involve relationships, balance, and learning to make decisions. You build discipline through partnership and creating harmony.
Saturn.Scorpio: Your challenges involve transformation, power, and learning to let go. You build discipline through deep change and facing your shadows.
Saturn.Sagittarius: Your challenges involve beliefs, expansion, and learning to be realistic. You build discipline through seeking truth and taking responsibility for your philosophy.
Saturn.Capricorn: Your challenges involve structure, authority, and learning to balance work and life. This is your natural sign. You build discipline through achievement and tradition.
Saturn.Aquarius: Your challenges involve independence, innovation, and learning to balance freedom with responsibility. You build discipline through breaking free while staying grounded.
Saturn.Pisces: Your challenges involve boundaries, illusions, and learning to face reality. You build discipline through spiritual practice and learning to distinguish truth from illusion.

Rahu.Aries: Your desires involve being independent and taking initiative. You're drawn to leadership and may obsess over being first. Your ambitions are tied to your identity.
Rahu.Taurus: Your desires involve accumulating resources and material security. You're drawn to possessions and may obsess over money. Your ambitions are tied to values.
Rahu.Gemini: Your desires involve communication and learning. You're drawn to knowledge and may obsess over ideas. Your ambitions are tied to mental pursuits.
Rahu.Cancer: Your desires involve home and family security. You're drawn to roots and may obsess over emotional stability. Your ambitions are tied to your foundation.
Rahu.Leo: Your desires involve creativity and recognition. You're drawn to self-expression and may obsess over being admired. Your ambitions are tied to play and romance.
Rahu.Virgo: Your desires involve service and perfection. You're drawn to helping others and may obsess over health. Your ambitions are tied to improvement.
Rahu.Libra: Your desires involve partnerships and balance. You're drawn to relationships and may obsess over finding the perfect partner. Your ambitions are tied to harmony.
Rahu.Scorpio: Your desires involve transformation and power. You're drawn to intensity and may obsess over control. Your ambitions are tied to deep change.
Rahu.Sagittarius: Your desires involve philosophy and expansion. You're drawn to truth-seeking and may obsess over beliefs. Your ambitions are tied to higher learning.
Rahu.Capricorn: Your desires involve career and achievement. You're drawn to recognition and may obsess over status. Your ambitions are tied to your public image.
Rahu.Aquarius: Your desires involve friendships and innovation. You're drawn to groups and may obsess over ideals. Your ambitions are tied to humanitarian causes.
Rahu.Pisces: Your desires involve spirituality and escape. You're drawn to transcendence and may obsess over illusions. Your ambitions are tied to letting go.

Ketu.Aries: You're releasing attachment to ego and identity. Your spiritual path involves learning humility and letting go of the need to be first. You seek detachment from self.
Ketu.Taurus: You're releasing attachment to possessions and material security. Your spiritual path involves learning to value non-material things. You seek detachment from resources.
Ketu.Gemini: You're releasing attachment to communication and mental activity. Your spiritual path involves learning silence and going beyond words. You seek detachment from ideas.
Ketu.Cancer: You're releasing attachment to home and family patterns. Your spiritual path involves learning independence and letting go of the past. You seek detachment from roots.
Ketu.Leo: You're releasing attachment to creativity and recognition. Your spiritual path involves learning humility and letting go of the need for attention. You seek detachment from self-expression.
Ketu.Virgo: You're releasing attachment to service and perfection. Your spiritual path involves learning to accept imperfection. You seek detachment from improvement.
Ketu.Libra: You're releasing attachment to partnerships and balance. Your spiritual path involves learning independence and letting go of the need for others. You seek detachment from relationships.
Ketu.Scorpio: You're releasing attachment to power and control. Your spiritual path involves learning to let go and finding peace in surrender. You seek detachment from transformation.
Ketu.Sagittarius: You're releasing attachment to beliefs and expansion. Your spiritual path involves learning to be present and letting go of the need to seek more. You seek detachment from philosophy.
Ketu.Capricorn: You're releasing attachment to career and achievement. Your spiritual path involves learning flexibility and letting go of the need for status. You seek detachment from reputation.
Ketu.Aquarius: You're releasing attachment to friendships and innovation. Your spiritual path involves learning connection and letting go of the need to be different. You seek detachment from groups.
Ketu.Pisces: You're releasing attachment to illusions and escape. Your spiritual path involves learning to face reality and letting go of the need to transcend. You seek detachment from the subconscious.

Ascendant.Aries: You appear bold, independent, and action-oriented. Others see you as a natural leader who takes initiative. You approach life with courage and directness.
Ascendant.Taurus: You appear stable, reliable, and grounded. Others see you as patient and sensual. You approach life with persistence and value security and comfort.
Ascendant.Gemini: You appear curious, communicative, and versatile. Others see you as quick-witted and adaptable. You approach life with curiosity and love learning.
Ascendant.Cancer: You appear nurturing, sensitive, and protective. Others see you as emotional and intuitive. You approach life with care and value security and family.
Ascendant.Leo: You appear confident, creative, and dramatic. Others see you as charismatic and warm. You approach life with enthusiasm and love being recognized.
Ascendant.Virgo: You appear analytical, practical, and detail-oriented. Others see you as organized and helpful. You approach life with precision and value improvement.
Ascendant.Libra: You appear diplomatic, charming, and balanced. Others see you as cooperative and aesthetic. You approach life seeking harmony and beauty.
Ascendant.Scorpio: You appear intense, mysterious, and powerful. Others see you as transformative and deep. You approach life with intensity and are drawn to mysteries.
Ascendant.Sagittarius: You appear optimistic, adventurous, and philosophical. Others see you as free-spirited and honest. You approach life seeking truth and expansion.
Ascendant.Capricorn: You appear serious, ambitious, and disciplined. Others see you as responsible and traditional. You approach life with structure and value achievement.
Ascendant.Aquarius: You appear unique, independent, and forward-thinking. Others see you as innovative and humanitarian. You approach life with originality and value freedom.
Ascendant.Pisces: You appear dreamy, compassionate, and intuitive. Others see you as artistic and empathetic. You approach life with imagination and spiritual sensitivity.

form.birthInformationTooltip: Your birth date establishes the core planetary framework used to generate your chart. Providing your birth time is optional, yet it significantly enhances precision because planetary positions shift throughout the day. Supplying your birth location further refines the calculation by allowing the system to align celestial coordinates with your exact geographic point of origin.

faq.howToGetStars: How do I get more stars?
faq.howToGetStarsAnswer: You can purchase stars through our billing page or earn them through special promotions. Check the pricing page for current packages.
faq.refundPolicyAnswer: We offer refunds within 7 days of purchase for unused stars. Contact us with your transaction details for assistance.
faq.dataPrivacyAnswer: Yes, all your readings and personal information are kept completely private and secure. We never share your data with third parties.
faq.readingAccuracyAnswer: Our AI-powered interpretations provide insightful guidance based on traditional tarot wisdom. Use them as a tool for reflection and personal growth.

social.subtitle: Earn +1 star per platform (up to 5 total).
social.description: Tap a platform, follow Asking Fate, and we'll add your bonus instantly. Each platform can be claimed once.
social.signIn: Sign in to claim these social rewards.
social.success: Thanks for following us on {platform}! +1 star added.
social.error: We couldn't grant stars right now. Please try again.

content.title: Create Content About Us
content.subtitle: Create content. Earn stars.
content.body: Create content about Asking Fate—text, images, or video—and earn stars based on format. Submit a public link; we review within 24–48 hours.
content.note: 💡 Share the public link to your content. We'll review and approve manually within 24-48 hours.

share.title: Share a Reading
share.subtitle: Share a link. Earn up to 3/day.
share.body: Earn +1 star for each unique visitor who opens your shared reading—capped at 3 stars per day. Awards apply automatically.

refer.title: Refer a Friend
refer.subtitle: Invite friends. Earn together.
refer.body: Share your referral link. You and your friend each earn 5 stars (up to 10 friends per week). If 10 friends register within a week, you receive a 10‑star bonus. Stars are granted when invited friends complete registration.

CheckoutSuccess.title: Thank You for Your Purchase!
CheckoutSuccess.description: Your payment has been processed successfully. Your stars have been added to your account and are ready to use.
CheckoutSuccess.descriptionWithStars: Your payment has been processed successfully. {stars} stars have been added to your account and are ready to use.
CheckoutSuccess.descriptionInfinity: Your payment has been processed successfully. You now have unlimited stars and are ready to use them.
CheckoutSuccess.emailLabel: Receipt has been sent to your email address:
CheckoutSuccess.supportText: If you have any questions, please email

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences and email marketing settings
Settings.authRequired: Please sign in to access settings

notifications.title: Push Notifications
notifications.enableDesc: Receive push notifications on your device

privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.showEmailDesc: Display your email on your profile
privacy.showBirthDateDesc: Display your birth date on your profile
privacy.allowMessagesDesc: Allow others to send you messages
